affinity.FR: Volonte du Serpent a Plumes - Morale

note.FR:
Focus Intensite de competence + Morale. Tolerance cible 149/100. 5 modules de Track-Shift requis.

Ajustements d'affinite (Game8) : Slot 1 Crescent, Slot 2 Triangle, Slot 3 Diamond, Slot 4 Ellipse, Slot 5 Triangle, Slots 6-8 aucun.

Loadout : Wings·Inspo·Morale (Lumino) en slot 1, Prime·Morale en slot 2, Skylume·Wildfire en slot 3, Fengshi Type III: Tracking Mode (mod exclusif Su Yi, projectiles a tete chercheuse) en slot 4, 4x Scorch (Lumino) sur slots 5-8.

Affinity centrale : Feathered Serpent's Morale (mods-51765, r5 Lumino).

note.EN: Fina - Weapon DMG and PEN buffs. Direct synergy with the kit's Weapon DMG scaling.

note.FR: Fushu - Intensite de competence, soins, Ultra Shields et restauration de Lucidite.

note.FR: Source principale de degats - a monter en priorite absolue.

note.EN: Mobility tool only - low upgrade priority.

notes.FR:
Su Yi est une DPS Lumino a distance basee sur le Mode Etoile Filante (Starfall Mode), qui consume de la Lucidite pour generer des stacks de Poudre d'Artificier. Chaque palier de 40 Lucidite consommee donne 1 stack de Soar (max 10 = boost Morale maximum).

Boucle de jeu :
1. Utiliser Sunward pour traverser rapidement (commissions Excavation/Mediation).
2. Entrer en Starfall Mode, generer Poudre d'Artificier.
3. Coup melee = Sword Aflash (gros degats, lent), coup distance = Stars Ashower.
4. Chaque Poudre depensee = 1 stack de Momentum.
5. A 50+ stacks consommes, lance un Fengshi Model (AoE).
6. Le mod Fengshi Type III: Tracking Mode (slot 4) donne le ciblage automatique - retire la charge mentale du aim.

Synergie cle : Max Ammo eleve a l'arme distance = plus de Poudre a l'entree = plus de Momentum = plus de degats Fengshi + meilleure restauration de Lucidite.

Intron priority (ordre d'unlock) :
- I1 (★★★★★) : double les stacks Momentum max (200) + 2 stacks par poudre. Massif.
- I2 (★★★★★) : auto-declenche Stars Ashower pendant Starfall, genere Momentum sans cout en poudre.
- I4 (★★★★☆) : controle de foule, tire les ennemis ensemble sur Skill DMG.
- I6 (★★★★☆) : PEN scaling +, lance 2 Fengshi Models additionnels a 20% degats chacun.
- I3, I5 : stats only - priorite faible.
- I7 : non disponible.

Faiblesses : Sword Aflash lent au swing, plein potentiel verrouille derriere les Introns (surtout I1 + I2).

Source : Game8 (https://game8.co/games/Duet-Night-Abyss/archives/570654).
notes.EN:
Su Yi is a ranged Lumino DPS built around Starfall Mode, which consumes Sanity to generate Artificer Powder stacks. Every 40 Sanity consumed grants 1 stack of Soar (max 10 = max Morale boost).

Core loop:
1. Use Sunward for rapid map traversal (Excavation/Mediation commissions).
2. Enter Starfall Mode, generate Artificer Powder.
3. Melee swing = Sword Aflash (high damage, slow), ranged shot = Stars Ashower.
4. Each powder spent = 1 Momentum stack.
5. At 50+ stacks consumed, launch a Fengshi Model (AoE).
6. The Fengshi Type III: Tracking Mode mod (slot 4) provides auto-homing - removes the aiming burden.

Key synergy: Higher ranged Max Ammo = more Artificer Powder on entry = more Momentum = higher Fengshi Model damage + better Sanity restoration.

Intron priority (unlock order):
- I1 (★★★★★): doubles Momentum max stacks (200) + 2 stacks per powder. Massive damage boost.
- I2 (★★★★★): auto-triggers Stars Ashower during Starfall, generates Momentum without powder cost.
- I4 (★★★★☆): crowd control bonus, pulls enemies together on Skill DMG.
- I6 (★★★★☆): PEN scaling +, launches 2 additional Fengshi Models at 20% damage each.
- I3, I5: stat-only - low priority.
- I7: not available.

Weaknesses: Sword Aflash slow swings, full kit potential locked behind Introns (especially I1 + I2).

Source: Game8 (https://game8.co/games/Duet-Night-Abyss/archives/570654).
